case_number: constitutional petition is disposed of as not

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.D- 380 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections 2. For katcha Peshi 13.02.2018. Mr. Pervez Tarique Taggar Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto Asstt:A.G a/w SIP Najamuddin on behalf of SHO P.S.Qasimabad, SIP Dilijan Rind on behalf of Incharge CIA Hyderabad. -=-=- Learned counsel for the petitioner, under the instructions of petitioner does not press this constitutional petition as according to him the alleged detenue has been shown in some criminal case, therefore, instant constitutional petition is disposed of as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE A.Rasheed/steno
